title: Calvin's wonderland.jar
description: A compilation of YouTuber Calvin's mods from his series: wonderland.jar
body:
![Calvin's Wonderland.jar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1963d182927a448e9dff2c06d868246e239b17f7.png)

This **modpack** is built around the **"Wonderland.jar"** experience made famous by **Calvin**. It’s designed to mirror the eerie atmosphere of his series, focusing on a **slow-burn horror experience** where you are constantly being hunted

------------------

**What to Expect:**

**The Hunt**: Strange entities like **no_one, Fate, and Sorrow** will stalk you. They don't just jump-scare; they watch and eventually pull you into the **"Wonderland."
**
**The Wonderland**: A liminal dimension (**Backrooms-style**) featuring 25 levels and 32 unique entities.

**Unpredictable**: The pack is **extremely random**. You might be taken on Day 2 or Day 15—**you never know when it's coming.**

-------------------------
**General explanation of the Modpack**

[WonderLand.jar](https://modrinth.com/mod/wonderland-jar) is supposed to be slow-burn and it is EXTREMELY random, in some worlds you'll get taken to "wonderland" on 2nd ingame day, in others it'll take 15 ingame days for anything to happen

-----------------------------------------

**Credits & Legal:**

**All rights** to the original mod and assets belong to **alexander.25.k and their team**. This modpack is a curated collection designed for **fans of the series** and does not claim **ownership** over any individual mods included

Special T H A N K S ✧( ु•⌄• ) To the Creators Of this mod

------------------------------------------
